requirement_topic.en: Liberia Grid-Connection Settings — 120/240 V, 60 Hz, IEC 62116 Anti-Islanding, and IEC 61727 Interface Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: 利比里亚并网参数——120/240 V、60 Hz、IEC 62116防孤岛及IEC 61727接口证据
requirement_topic.zht: 賴比瑞亞併網參數——120/240 V、60 Hz、IEC 62116防孤島及IEC 61727介面證據

summary.en: Liberia is commonly reported as using a 120/240 V, 60 Hz supply system, especially around Monrovia and legacy LEC service areas influenced by US practice. Public, inverter-specific LEC interconnection settings have not been identified, so exporters should treat the 60 Hz point as a mandatory engineering confirmation rather than assume a 50 Hz African or Chinese default. Grid-tied PV inverters should be configured and documented for the actual Liberia utility or mini-grid voltage, frequency, anti-islanding trip thresholds, reconnection delay, voltage and frequency ride-through limits, and local protection scheme. IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence should be tested or reviewed at 60 Hz for the supplied firmware configuration.
summary.zh: 利比里亚通常被报告采用120/240 V、60 Hz供电体系，尤其是在蒙罗维亚及受美国制式影响的LEC传统服务区域。尚未发现公开的、专门针对逆变器的LEC接入整定值，因此出口商应将60 Hz作为必须工程确认的要点，而不应假设适用非洲或中国常见的50 Hz默认值。并网光伏逆变器应按实际利比里亚公用事业或微电网电压、频率、防孤岛跳闸阈值、重连延时、电压和频率穿越限值及本地保护方案进行配置和记录。IEC 62116防孤岛及IEC 61727公用电网接口证据应针对所供应固件配置按60 Hz测试或审查。
summary.zht: 賴比瑞亞通常被報告採用120/240 V、60 Hz供電體系，尤其是在蒙羅維亞及受美國制式影響的LEC傳統服務區域。尚未發現公開的、專門針對逆變器的LEC接入整定值，因此出口商應將60 Hz作為必須工程確認的要點，而不應假設適用非洲或中國常見的50 Hz預設值。併網光伏逆變器應按實際賴比瑞亞公用事業或微電網電壓、頻率、防孤島跳閘閾值、重連延時、電壓和頻率穿越限值及本地保護方案進行配置和記錄。IEC 62116防孤島及IEC 61727公用電網介面證據應針對所供應韌體配置按60 Hz測試或審查。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
LEC or applicable local utility interconnection conditions — confirm project-specific voltage, frequency, protection, metering, and commissioning requirements
Liberia 120/240 V, 60 Hz supply context — confirm feeder-specific requirements before configuring inverter firmware

summary.en: China grid-connection evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, GB/T 37408, and domestic anti-islanding tests. These are normally prepared around China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid baseline and Chinese grid-operator protection settings. Even if the hardware is capable of 60 Hz operation, China-default firmware, relay thresholds, harmonic assumptions, and anti-islanding reports cannot be assumed valid for Liberia unless the exact 60 Hz configuration is documented and, where required, retested.
summary.zh: 中国并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408和国内防孤岛测试。这些文件通常围绕中国220/380 V、50 Hz电网基准和中国电网运营商保护整定编制。即使硬件具备60 Hz运行能力，也不能假设中国默认固件、继电保护阈值、谐波假设和防孤岛报告对利比里亚有效，除非已记录准确的60 Hz配置，并在要求时重新测试。
summary.zht: 中國併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004、GB/T 37408和國內防孤島測試。這些文件通常圍繞中國220/380 V、50 Hz電網基準和中國電網運營商保護整定編制。即使硬體具備60 Hz運行能力，也不能假設中國預設韌體、繼電保護閾值、諧波假設和防孤島報告對賴比瑞亞有效，除非已記錄準確的60 Hz配置，並在要求時重新測試。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
GB/T 156 — 标准电压 (Standard voltages; China 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline)
NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: China 50 Hz grid certificates do not prove a Liberia 60 Hz grid configuration. Exporters should obtain the feeder or mini-grid connection parameters from LEC or the relevant operator; set the inverter country code or custom profile for Liberia's actual voltage and 60 Hz frequency; document anti-islanding thresholds, reconnection timing, ride-through limits, and export-control functions; and obtain IEC 62116 / IEC 61727 evidence covering that 60 Hz firmware profile. Where a test report only covers 50 Hz China settings, require engineering justification or retesting before shipment.
gap.zh: 差距：中国50 Hz并网证书不能证明利比里亚60 Hz并网配置。出口商应从LEC或相关运营方取得馈线或微电网接入参数；将逆变器国家代码或自定义配置设置为利比里亚实际电压和60 Hz频率；记录防孤岛阈值、重连时间、电压/频率穿越限值及防逆流或输出控制功能；并取得覆盖该60 Hz固件配置的IEC 62116 / IEC 61727证据。若测试报告仅覆盖中国50 Hz设置，应在出货前要求工程论证或重新测试。
gap.zht: 差距：中國50 Hz併網證書不能證明賴比瑞亞60 Hz併網配置。出口商應從LEC或相關運營方取得饋線或微電網接入參數；將逆變器國家代碼或自定義配置設置為賴比瑞亞實際電壓和60 Hz頻率；記錄防孤島閾值、重連時間、電壓/頻率穿越限值及防逆流或輸出控制功能；並取得覆蓋該60 Hz韌體配置的IEC 62116 / IEC 61727證據。若測試報告僅覆蓋中國50 Hz設置，應在出貨前要求工程論證或重新測試。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for any grid-tied installation accepted by LEC or another licensed operator; exact 60 Hz settings and protection requirements are project-specific gates
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence satisfies China domestic grid-review needs but does not transfer to Liberia 60 Hz acceptance without reconfiguration and review

source.publisher: Mains electricity by country compilation; verify against LEC/LERC project documents before use

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Liberia should not be handled as a 50 Hz / 220-380 V destination by default. Treat 60 Hz grid protection as a critical compliance gap: reconfigure the inverter, document the exact firmware profile, and confirm with LEC or the relevant licensed operator whether IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence must be retested at 60 Hz.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应默认将利比里亚按50 Hz / 220-380 V目的地处理。应将60 Hz电网保护视为关键合规差距：重新配置逆变器，记录准确固件配置，并向LEC或相关持牌运营方确认IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据是否必须按60 Hz重新测试。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應預設將賴比瑞亞按50 Hz / 220-380 V目的地處理。應將60 Hz電網保護視為關鍵合規差距：重新配置逆變器，記錄準確韌體配置，並向LEC或相關持牌運營方確認IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據是否必須按60 Hz重新測試。

requirement_topic.en: LERC Licensing, LEC Connection Review, and Off-Grid / Mini-Grid Solar Project Gates
requirement_topic.zh: LERC许可、LEC接入审查及离网 / 微电网太阳能项目门槛
requirement_topic.zht: LERC許可、LEC接入審查及離網 / 微電網太陽能項目門檻

summary.en: Liberia's electricity sector is regulated by the Liberia Electricity Regulatory Commission (LERC), whose public site lists licensing and permits, technical regulations, electricity licensing applications, micro-utility licensing applications, and certification of electrical professionals. LEC remains the principal utility for many grid-connected customers, while Liberia also has rural, mini-grid, and donor-funded solar electrification activity. Grid-tied PV inverters may therefore face several gates: LERC licence or permit requirements for the project activity, LEC or licensed-operator interconnection review, certified electrical-professional requirements, commissioning inspection, and donor or lender specifications. Off-grid and mini-grid projects commonly reference IEC TS 62257, VeraSol or Lighting Global quality-assurance practices, and project-specific procurement rules.
summary.zh: 利比里亚电力行业由Liberia Electricity Regulatory Commission（LERC）监管，其公开网站列有许可和准证、技术法规、电力许可申请、微型公用事业许可申请以及电气专业人员认证。LEC仍是许多并网客户的主要公用事业单位，同时利比里亚存在农村、微电网和捐助方资助的太阳能电气化活动。因此，并网光伏逆变器可能面临多个门槛：项目活动的LERC许可或准证要求、LEC或持牌运营方接入审查、电气专业人员认证要求、调试检查以及捐助方或贷款方规格。离网和微电网项目通常引用IEC TS 62257、VeraSol或Lighting Global质量保证实践以及项目专用采购规则。
summary.zht: 賴比瑞亞電力行業由Liberia Electricity Regulatory Commission（LERC）監管，其公開網站列有許可和准證、技術法規、電力許可申請、微型公用事業許可申請以及電氣專業人員認證。LEC仍是許多併網客戶的主要公用事業單位，同時賴比瑞亞存在農村、微電網和捐助方資助的太陽能電氣化活動。因此，併網光伏逆變器可能面臨多個門檻：項目活動的LERC許可或准證要求、LEC或持牌運營方接入審查、電氣專業人員認證要求、調試檢查以及捐助方或貸款方規格。離網和微電網項目通常引用IEC TS 62257、VeraSol或Lighting Global品質保證實務以及項目專用採購規則。

standards_or_laws: Liberia Electricity Regulatory Commission (LERC) — licensing, permits, technical regulation, micro-utility licensing, and electrical professional certification
Liberia Electricity Corporation (LEC) or licensed operator connection requirements — confirm for each grid-tied project
IEC TS 62257 series — Recommendations for renewable energy and hybrid systems for rural electrification (common off-grid and mini-grid reference)
VeraSol / Lighting Global quality assurance frameworks — common donor procurement reference for off-grid solar equipment where specified

summary.en: China has domestic distributed PV and utility-scale connection procedures under Chinese energy authorities and grid companies, and products may carry China voluntary certification or domestic grid-connection approvals. Those approvals do not create a Liberia project licence, LEC interconnection right, certified-installer status, or donor procurement clearance. A China factory's domestic commissioning record also does not address Liberia's low-electrification deployment context, micro-utility licensing, English documentation, local operator training, spare-parts planning, or post-installation service requirements.
summary.zh: 中国分布式光伏和大型电站接入程序由中国能源主管部门和电网公司管理，产品可能持有中国自愿认证或国内并网批准。这些批准不会自动形成利比里亚项目许可、LEC接入权、电气专业人员资质或捐助方采购放行。中国工厂的国内调试记录也不能覆盖利比里亚低电气化部署背景、微型公用事业许可、英文文件、本地运营培训、备件规划或安装后服务要求。
summary.zht: 中國分散式光伏和大型電站接入程序由中國能源主管部門和電網公司管理，產品可能持有中國自願認證或國內併網批准。這些批准不會自動形成賴比瑞亞項目許可、LEC接入權、電氣專業人員資質或捐助方採購放行。中國工廠的國內調試記錄也不能覆蓋賴比瑞亞低電氣化部署背景、微型公用事業許可、英文文件、本地運營培訓、備件規劃或安裝後服務要求。

standards_or_laws: NB/T 32004-2018 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: China product certificates do not resolve Liberia project permissions. Before shipment, identify whether the installation is LEC-grid-tied, connected to another licensed operator, a regulated micro-utility, or fully off-grid; map the necessary LERC licence, permit, or certified-professional requirement; obtain the interconnection and commissioning conditions from LEC or the operator; and check whether donor specifications impose IEC TS 62257, VeraSol, English manuals, warranty, monitoring, cybersecurity, or service obligations. The compliance file should separate product conformity from project licensing and from local installation approval.
gap.zh: 差距：中国产品证书不能解决利比里亚项目许可问题。出货前，应识别该安装是接入LEC电网、接入其他持牌运营方、属于受监管微型公用事业，还是完全离网；梳理所需LERC许可、准证或电气专业人员认证要求；从LEC或运营方取得接入和调试条件；并核查捐助方规格是否要求IEC TS 62257、VeraSol、英文手册、质保、监控、网络安全或服务义务。合规文件应区分产品合格、项目许可和本地安装批准。
gap.zht: 差距：中國產品證書不能解決賴比瑞亞項目許可問題。出貨前，應識別該安裝是接入LEC電網、接入其他持牌運營方、屬於受監管微型公用事業，還是完全離網；梳理所需LERC許可、准證或電氣專業人員認證要求；從LEC或運營方取得接入和調試條件；並核查捐助方規格是否要求IEC TS 62257、VeraSol、英文手冊、質保、監控、網路安全或服務義務。合規文件應區分產品合格、項目許可和本地安裝批准。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where the project activity falls under LERC licensing, micro-utility licensing, LEC or licensed-operator interconnection, certified electrical-professional rules, or donor/lender procurement conditions
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic distributed-PV or grid-connection approvals are not transferable to LERC, LEC, licensed operators, or donor project owners in Liberia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Liberia project approval as separate from China product certification. Confirm LERC licensing or permit requirements, LEC or operator interconnection conditions, certified electrical-professional obligations, and any donor off-grid or mini-grid specifications before committing Chinese inverter models to the project.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将利比里亚项目批准与中国产品认证分开处理。在将中国逆变器型号用于项目之前，请确认LERC许可或准证要求、LEC或运营方接入条件、电气专业人员认证义务以及任何捐助方离网或微电网规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將賴比瑞亞項目批准與中國產品認證分開處理。在將中國逆變器型號用於項目之前，請確認LERC許可或准證要求、LEC或運營方接入條件、電氣專業人員認證義務以及任何捐助方離網或微電網規格。
